info.name: API Tests for Sales Pipeline
info.description:
## API Tests for Sales Pipeline

This collection contains API tests designed to support and validate the **Sales Pipeline** workflow. It targets the [JSONPlaceholder](https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com) API — a free, public REST API commonly used for testing and prototyping.

### What's Included

- **User Data Retrieval** — GET requests to the `/users` endpoint to fetch user records, which can represent leads, contacts, or account owners in a sales context.
    

### Purpose

Use this collection to verify that user-related API endpoints are functioning correctly as part of your sales pipeline testing strategy. It serves as a foundation for building out more comprehensive test coverage across the pipeline.
